headline: Special Education Waiting List Exceeds 15,000 Nationwide
context: Parents report waiting over 18 months for special education placement in MOE integrated programs as of early 2026.

cards.big: 15,000 children await special education placement as of January 2026
cards.sub: Shortage of trained special education teachers drives the backlog

cards.big: Malaysia has only 12,400 special education teachers for 98,000 registered students
cards.sub: Ratio of 1 teacher to 8 students exceeds recommended 1 to 5

cards.big: Persons with Disabilities Act 2008 guarantees education access in Section 28
cards.sub: Enforcement mechanisms remain weak with no penalty for non-compliance

cards.big: Only 34% of schools have physical accessibility features as of 2025 audit
cards.sub: Ramps, accessible toilets, and sensory rooms are still exceptions

cards.big: Inclusive education is a legal obligation not a discretionary budget item
Should mainstream schools be mandated to accept all students regardless of ability
